name: WF-6: Voice Agent API (→ SLNG voice service)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ signal: { accountId: $json.account_id, accountName: $json.company_name, contactName: $json.primary_contact_name, toNumber: $json.primary_contact_phone, plan: $json.plan_tier, renewalDate: $json.renewal_date, healthScore: $json.health_score, goal: ($json.success_metric || $json.executive_summary || 'Churn rescue: understand the issue and retain the account.'), notes: $json.call_script } }) }}
